info.english_meaning: to make an effort to try
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' gurate gU(gu)rayeteti Se RAvudyamane taNi  Syani gUryata ityevaM gatihiMsanayostaNi ' (Slo. 152) iti devaH  kecit ' gurI ' iti paWanti  anye ' gUrI ' iti paWanti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ujjugUre tataH SElaM hantumindrajitaM kapiH' (Bawwi0 1451) ujjugUre uccikzepa
